action.reasoning: Observation: I've been consistently facing issues with the CLIP model loading text components even when using CLIPVisionModel. The stderr output shows unexpected keys related to text_model components, which indicates that the CLIPVisionModel is still loading the full CLIP model with text components. The validation accuracy is still very low (~9.37%) which is close to random guessing. I need to completely change my approach and use a different model architecture that doesn't have these issues. Instead of using CLIPVisionModel, I'll use a standard ResNet model which should be more straightforward to implement and won't have the text component issues.
